title: Narrative Furnace
public_claim: Narrative Furnace is a proposed MuranoOS-native governed room that behaves less like a notes app and more like a "story war cell" for constructing compelling, gritty, morally gray, high-pressure dystopian stories.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
